violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.53 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #10b981, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 1.55 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #ffc570, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
